name: LG Gram 16 (2024)
introText: The LG Gram 16 2024 is the lightest 16-inch laptop in the world at 1.19kg, with MIL-SPEC durability, Intel Core Ultra 7, and up to 22 hours of battery life — extraordinary for its screen size.
whatWorks: 1.19kg for a 16-inch laptop is an engineering achievement — lighter than most 14-inch Windows laptops while offering full 16-inch screen real estate.
22-hour battery life is the best of any 16-inch laptop — MIL-SPEC durability (drops, temperature, pressure) adds genuine reliability beyond the lightweight chassis.
worthKnowing: White/light magnesium alloy chassis scuffs and stains visibly — the gram's signature magnesium-aluminum build is lightweight but picks up marks easily. Not the best choice for users with dirty hands or rough bags.
Display brightness caps at 350 nits — adequate indoors but limiting in bright environments.

commonComplaints.title: Display lacks brightness
commonComplaints.body: The IPS panel maxes at 350 nits — fine for offices but noticeably dim in bright rooms or outdoors.

commonComplaints.title: Chassis scuffs easily
commonComplaints.body: The magnesium alloy surface scratches easily compared to anodized aluminum alternatives. Long-term the gram shows wear.

commonComplaints.title: Performance lags premium ultrabooks under load
commonComplaints.body: The gram prioritizes battery and weight over sustained performance — CPU throttles during prolonged video editing or compiling.

verdict: The LG Gram 16 2024 is the right laptop for frequent travelers who need a 16-inch screen but can't tolerate carrying 2kg all day. Battery life and weight are class-leading. Display brightness and sustained performance are the trade-offs compared to heavier alternatives.

realBuyers.quote: Carry it everywhere. Weighs less than my 13-inch old laptop. At 16 inches. Incredible.
Battery lasted 19 hours in a marathon work day. Nothing else comes close at this screen size.
Dropped it twice — no damage. The MIL-SPEC certification is real.

metaDescription: LG Gram 16 2024 review Canada: Intel Ultra 7, 1.19kg, MIL-SPEC, 22-hr battery. ~$1,699 CAD. Lightest 16-inch laptop for Canadians.
